title: Emit Codex commandWindows so bee hooks run on Windows
action: Add a commandWindows field to every codex .codex/hooks.json hook entry (codex REPO target only). Value is shell-agnostic and relative-to-cwd: repo target -> `node hooks/<file> --source=repo`; host projection -> `node .bee/bin/hooks/<file> --source=repo`. POSIX `command` stays for Unix. Two render sites: hooks/catalog.mjs renderProjection (add commandWindows when runtime===codex && target===repo) and onboard_bee.mjs renderCodexHookEntries (host projection). Update byte-snapshot/contract tests, re-render .codex/hooks.json + plugin trees, full verify green.

truths: Every entry in a codex .codex/hooks.json (repo target) carries commandWindows = `node <hookpath> --source=repo`: repo target uses hooks/<file>, host projection uses .bee/bin/hooks/<file>.
commandWindows is shell-agnostic: no $(...), no [ -n ], no exec; a bare node invocation that runs under both cmd.exe and powershell.exe (Codex runs it with session cwd).
The POSIX `command` field is unchanged (Unix path via $SHELL -lc untouched); claude projections and any codex PLUGIN projection are byte-unchanged (commandWindows is codex-repo-only).
Full verify suite is green: rendered .codex/hooks.json + committed plugin trees match the render, and hook-contract/distribution/conformance/onboard tests pass.
prohibitions: Do NOT add commandWindows to claude projections or change the POSIX command string.
Do NOT use shell-specific syntax ($(...), if/for, env-var expansion) in commandWindows.

verify: node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_plugin_distribution.mjs && node scripts/test_conformance.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs && node scripts/test_skill_render.mjs

trace.verification_evidence: {"red_failure_evidence":"Before fix: codex .codex/hooks.json entries carried ONLY a POSIX command field (r=\"$(git rev-parse ...)\"; [ -n \"$r\" ] || {...}; exec node ...). Codex runs hook commands via $SHELL -lc; on Windows there is no POSIX $SHELL, so $(...), [ -n ], and exec are all invalid and EVERY codex hook errored (user report: all Codex hooks broken on Windows). Confirmed: grep for commandWindows across the render code returned zero — bee never emitted the Codex Windows override the hook schema supports.","green_evidence":"After fix: commandWindowsFor() in catalog.mjs and codexHookCommandWindows() in onboard_bee.mjs emit a bare, shell-agnostic, cwd-relative Windows command on every codex-repo hook entry: `node hooks/<file>.mjs --source=repo` (repo target) / `node .bee/bin/hooks/<file>.mjs --source=repo` (host projection) — no shell metacharacters, runs under cmd.exe AND powershell.exe (matches official Codex commandWindows docs pattern). commandWindows is codex-repo-only; claude projections unchanged; POSIX command unchanged. New test_hook_contracts row codex-repo-commandWindows-contract asserts the bare-node no-shell-metacharacters shape. Orchestrator independent full 33-suite verify: EXIT=0."}
trace.verify_output: ORCH_FULL_VERIFY_EXIT=0 (orchestrator independent re-run). Cell subset also green: test_hook_contracts (179 rows incl new codex-repo-commandWindows-contract), test_plugin_distribution 40, test_conformance, test_onboard_bee, test_skill_render 27.
